About Me

Hi, my name is Soroush and I’m 21 years old. My linux ‘s world has been started with Fedora, but I am currently user of the archlinux and I am working on it for more personalization.

  • Preparing a new gnu/linux distribution that is based on archlinux.

Projects

TorForWindows

https://gitlab.com/antisec/torforwindows

This project allows you to easily use the TOR software + Bridges on your Ms-Windows!

TOR is a free project that uses Onion Routing technique for anonymous communication over a computer network, that helps you to protect your anonymity while using the Internet. Of course, the TOR is not a Proxy or VPN! But, actually… as a secure Proxy, The TOR Network is secure or safer more than every Public Proxy or VPN.

However, sometimes I have to use Ms-Windows, and so I’ve prepare the TorForWindows for Windows using the official bundle of the TOR Project and another software packages such as: Privoxy and obfs4.

Conky_Digilog

This conky allows you to better monitor storage, bandwidth and resources in your GNU/Linux.

A plethora of OS stats (uname, uptime, CPU usage,mem usage, disk usage, “top” like process stats, and network monitoring, just to name a few). Built-in Cairo for arbitrary drawing Circle with (Lua more). Runs on GNU/Linux, FreeBSD, OpenBSD, DragonFlyBSD, NetBSD, Solaris, Haiku OS, and macOS! and much more.

SoroushSharing

https://gitlab.com/SoroushSharing/soroushsharing.gitlab.io

SoroushSharing is my personal static blog. powered by Hugo.

In fact, I’m not a crazy professional blogger at all. Maybe I’ll be, but I’m not interested in it. I had started Soroush Sharing as a fun project. but now, I understand that every Senior IT man has a personal web-site or bolg.

ArchSUS linux

No introduction, I love GNU/Linux.

To begin a technical research and development project; start to deeply personalize of archlinux for myself. This is an exciting and interesting project.
